Emma — I can schedule this, but 10:00 on 2024-05-19 is already taken. Current events that day:
- Project Kick-off: 10:00–11:00
- One-on-One with Manager: 11:00–11:30

Options I can schedule instead (1 hour):
- 11:30–12:30 (immediately after your one-on-one) — recommended
- 09:00–10:00 (before the kick-off)

Please confirm:
1. Which time do you prefer (11:30–12:30 or 09:00–10:00), or should I try to find another slot that day?
2. Title for the event (suggested: "Follow-up Meeting")
3. Short description to include (suggested: "Follow-up to review action items and next steps from the recent meeting.")
4. Who to invite (leave blank to keep it on your calendar only), and whether you want a location or virtual link.

Once you confirm, I’ll create the event.
